race.comment: SENSE OF TIMING (10) resumes from a spell and cops a nasty draw as well. She has had 3 trials to get ready, and though she usually takes a run to get ready, she is a year older, and does have the services of Opie Bosson, so don't rule her out of winning fresh up. MISS JONES (7) was very well placed when winning 4 races on a bounce before finishing a game fourth in the Listed Lightning Handicap at Trentham 5 weeks ago. She has won her only start here, and on a likely wet track, she will be hard to hold out. ROMILLY (5) has made progress this season, and she was runner-up by less than a length at Trentham 4 weeks ago as the favourite. She will be hitting the line hard again, and with the right run, she could have the last say here. MERCHANT QUEEN (2) has only battled this season and will be dropping down in class for this suitable assignment. A form reversal is on the cards. Each way value. MAGICE (13) was well found in the market fresh, and peaked on his run late. Stick with him.
race.rail_position: True | No Rain Last 24 Hours | 27mm Rain Last 7 Days
